name: SANJAY B G
role: Data Analyst Turning Operational Data into Business Decisions
summary: I work with SQL, Python, Power BI, and Tableau to clean complex data, uncover trends, and build dashboards that drive measurable action.
headline: Data Analyst Turning Operational Data into Business Decisions
subheadline: I work with SQL, Python, Power BI, and Tableau to clean complex data, uncover trends, and build dashboards that drive measurable action.
shortIntro: I'm Sanjay B G, a Data Analyst with hands-on experience in logistics and business analytics. I specialize in converting raw data into clear insights through ETL, exploratory analysis, KPI tracking, and data storytelling.
aboutSection:
I am a Data Analyst focused on solving real business problems using data. During my experience at Manoj Cargo Carriers, I worked on shipment booking, dispatch, and vendor payment datasets to identify route-level revenue patterns and operational gaps.

My core strength is end-to-end analytics: from data cleaning and transformation to dashboard development and insight communication. I have worked with SQL (MySQL), Python (Pandas), Excel, Power BI, and Tableau to build analytics workflows that help teams make better decisions.

I also collaborated with engineering teams during a Django monolith-to-microservices migration, supporting dataset validation and data consistency across services. This gave me strong cross-functional exposure to both analytics and product environments.
whatIBring: Strong SQL-driven analysis for operational and business data
Clean, reliable datasets through ETL and validation
Dashboarding and KPI reporting for leadership visibility
Insight storytelling that connects data to action
skills: SQL, MySQL, Python, Pandas, NumPy, Excel, Exploratory Data Analysis
Power BI, Tableau, Dashboard Development, KPI Reporting, Data Storytelling
ETL, Data Cleaning, Data Transformation, Data Warehousing, Star Schema Modeling

experience.role: Graduate Trainee Engineer — Data & Operations Analytics

contact.openToOpportunities: Open to Data Analyst opportunities in Analytics, BI, and Operations Analytics
